title: Contempt power
doc_html:
Art. 4848.  Contempt power

A city court and parish court have the same power to punish a contempt of court as a district court.

Acts 1986, No. 156, §1.

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1986, NO. 156, §3.}}
